title: CausalAtlas: where causal grounding lives in LLM-orchestrated perturbation foundation models
description: CausalAtlas is a measurement-first study of causal grounding when a large language model orchestrates a fallible single-cell perturbation foundation model. Across real perturbation data and frontier LLMs, the release maps where grounding comes from and identifies per-input competence/value estimation as the central engineerable bottleneck.
